rulings.Case Title: THOMAS H. LUTGE VS. MICHAEL C. MILLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motin By Pltf For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 3, 2007, LINE 1 PLAINTIFF THOMAS LUTGE'S Notice Of Motion And Motion By Plaintiff For Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED; THE PROPOSED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT PLEADS A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD. DEFENDANT WILL NOT BE PREJUDICED BY THE AMENDMENT. =(302/PJM/KP)

rulings.Case Title: DANNIE RAY REESE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Judgment Filed By Defendant Caterpillar Inc.
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 3, 2007, LINE 16 MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CATERPILLAR INC. IS DENIED. FTSB BLOOD DECLARATION LACKS FACTS TO ESTABLISH A SUFFICIENT FOUNDATION FOR THE TESTIMONY GIVEN. PLAINTIFF WAS EXPOSED TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT AND DEFENDANTS INTERROGATORIES REFLECT THAT DEFENADNT'S PRODUCTS DURING THIS PERIOD HAD ASBESTOS. PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORY ANSWERS EXPLAIN PLANTIFF'S THEORY OF EXPOSURE. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON MEDICAL CAUSATION. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND TREW VS. TITO AVILA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 3, 2007, LINE 8 DEFENDANT TITO AVILA, TITO AVILA, FRANK HOWARD ALLEN REALTORS-SAN FRANCISCO'S Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice IS GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART. THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED WITHIN 2 YEARS OF DISCOVERY OF THE CLAIMS. CAUSES OF ACTION 3 TO 7 ARE PLEAD WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY AND STATE CAUSES OD ACTION. THE 1ST AND 2ND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BARRED BY STATUTE OF FRAUD IN THAT THEY ARE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF A BROKERAGE CONTRACT. =(302/PJM/KD)
